series_metadata.series_description: Merged credit union files contain the Articles of Incorporation and Code of Regulations of merged credit unions, all correspondence, financial information, and statutory examinations for a particular credit union.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility five (5) years date of merger ; Electronic: electronic files five (5) years date of merger
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
